item.title: Ive done the 50 hr minimum as an engineer and all I want to tell him is to get bent
item.description: This fucker is the most arrogant, narcissistic sociopath I've ever met. If I want to drive down engineering hours to improve the area while improving our engineer's mental wellbeing, I see absolutely no issue. Fuck corporate america and fuck capitalism

item.dc:creator: DrForester

item.title: A Tree Sitter Is Protecting A Forest In Washington State
item.description:
Olympic Forest Defenders say that the 192-acre forest slated to be cut is one of the last low-elevation mature forests in the Elwha watershed, and contains complex ecosystems, critical habitat, and developing old-growth characteristics. It also is the main forest in the watershed protecting the drinking water for the residents of Port Angeles. And it protects the salmon in the newly restored Elwha River nearby.
“People have been fighting this sale for two years,” said organizer Davis. “There have been rallies and attempts to obtain Trust Land Transfers. The City of Port Angeles asked Commissioner Upthegrove to halt the sale. The tree sitter is up there now because all other tactics have failed.”
Another organizer criticized the police presence at the base of the tree sit, who they claim harassed the tree-sitter all night with a loud generator and bright lights, and removed activists on the ground providing ground support.
Forest activists have placed barriers on the road attached to cables which are also attached to the tree sitter's shelter- if the barriers are removed by the cops or the loggers the shelter would fall and kill the tree sitter.
"I'm not going anywhere," said the tree sitter, using the moniker Red Breasted Nuthatch, in a statement released May 9. "Our new lands commissioner, Dave Upthegrove, promised to protect mature forests; we are here to help him keep his promise."
Here's ways to help: Here's the Olympic Forest Defenders Gofundme https://www.gofundme.com/f/accsvm-olympic-forest-defenders Message from the sitter: "Thank you for donating everyone! It is incredible to have so much support in this, from folks showing up on the ground to those helping with phone calls to those donating to our campaign. We have raised a lot of money! I am hopeful that we can maintain this sit for as long as needed without financial pressure, and even have enough leftover to buy equipment for the newly formed Olympic Forest Defenders to continue awesome work on the peninsula. Thank you thank you thank you!!!!" The sitter is also encouraging people to continue pressure on DNR and the newly-elected Commissioner of Public Lands by calling Dave Upthegrove at 360-902-1000, extension 4, or emailing him at cpl@dnr.wa.gov. Please leave a message reiterating our demands: 1. Immediate cancellation of the "Parched" Timber Sale 2. A pause on all logging in the Elwha watershed 3. A permanent ban on logging the remaining mature forests in western Washington. In Solidarity, Olympic Forest Defenders
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Some things never change.
item.description: I found this on an old Hard drive. The date stamp is from 2016. I don't know its exact age or the artist but it's crazy how even then, it was how it is now.

item.title: General Grievous, more like General Treevous
item.description:
But for real, stop giving the tree swords!
Why doesn't my renfaire a flying stork summoner?
Magic!
Me: What's my job? Them: We're going to launch a ten foot spear about thirty feet in the air and then you just catch it as it's coming down. Me: Sounds safe enough.
They have a towline to give the mermaid super speed swimming!?
What?!
At least they kept the clocktower pretty simple.
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Napathon [OC]
item.description:
I can sleep pretty much anytime, anywhere! Unless it’s in bed at night… you know, where you’re supposed to be sleeping!
Speaking of sleepy, here is Mr. Chonk diligently paying the cat tax <3 If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives

item.title: Memes and stuff: heaven and hell are the same thing if they last forever. You’ll get bored either way.
item.description:
I really only play casually anymore. Demigod of revenge is an auto 3 to 4 of in my red decks to make sure I have lethal.
I love the idea of some monks being followed by a herd of cats while making kitty calling noises.
I’ll get to my backlog eventually. SMTV has several endings, and I haven’t even touched the canon of vengeance yet….
The same people that said stimulus checks would make people not work because of “basic economics” are the ones confused by tariffs.
When my partner goes off on some anime or car thing.
Facts
I love orange himbos
I got a new laundry basket today. I was excited.
I don’t like quitters, lol
Use a dry erase marker on it, it should rehydrate it and it might come off. Maybe
I’ve been getting more practice. Just saying.
Yes
Any time I get too bratty, it’s the first thing my partner suggest.
I would call him, but I’ve moved on.
No wonder I’m good with a strap.
I love the implications, lol
I haven’t got back on TikTok since they blocked it the first time.
Me talking to any straight white person.
I’m quality over quantity. I want to be spanked hard and deliberately, instead we of fast a whippy.
Sploosh
It’s my one way to express myself artistically.
Both
STAX is only fun for one person.
This laundry basket is making me hungry for some reason….
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1363 (Mongol climate control)
item.description:
Let's get this bread, I guess.
I have no idea if I got the teaching job yet. Got offered a job to sell insurance to companies. I guess it'll have to do. Money is running tight, and frankly, if I eat one more rice-a-roni pasta bowl, I will cry into a pillow. I miss the taste of pizza, Gandalf.
Nowadays, Ghengis Khan and Tamurlane could do the same heroic conservation act by killing only 30 billionaires! Where is our new Great Khan?
I haven't seen a gull in YEARS. I miss them.
I love how when the last emperor of china asked for a phone, he used it to prank call people.
I dreamed of a world where somehow the Chola Empire made contact with the America's, and Mesoamerican Religion got even wilder with a fusion with Hinduism, and you had someone who believed he was an avatar of Huitzilopochtli fighting the Spaniards (with iron weapons) and winning, so you had a modern "Aztec" State. The states of Mesoamerica kept in contact with East Asia with the same sort of monsoon galleon trade the Spanish did with the Philippines.
Added a few more lines to my apocalyptic poem I've been working on.
Woke up with a massive headache today, not a migraine, realized I hadn't had coffee for four days. Guessing that might be the problem.
And if you want to do both, you're pansexual.
I would call my hypothetical partner any of those things she wanted. Call me.
Pertinax buying the Empire from the Praetorian guards.
When this happened at my old job, I would loudly announce "you're wrong, and this is why:," then Crack my knuckles, and then calmly explain why they were wrong, listing sources, and guessing where their misconceptions came from." Usually, it was actually appreciated.
I can't remember why this is here.
Big @xbadxfaeriex and @kaeldra energy.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "okay." [Existential conure screaming] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
